title: Master plan — minors 5.0–5.6 (five-track matrix)
summary: The app uses **real GraphQL** via `contact360.io/app/src/services/graphql/aiChatService.ts` (`aiChats`, `createAIChat`, **`sendAiMessage`**) and pages such as `app/(dashboard)/ai-chat/page.tsx` — **not** a permanent mock layer. Remaining work is **quality, guardrails, and ops** — not replacing mocks.

sections.heading: Dashboard AI chat — production wiring (confirmed)
sections.prose: The app uses **real GraphQL** via `contact360.io/app/src/services/graphql/aiChatService.ts` (`aiChats`, `createAIChat`, **`sendAiMessage`**) and pages such as `app/(dashboard)/ai-chat/page.tsx` — **not** a permanent mock layer. Remaining work is **quality, guardrails, and ops** — not replacing mocks.**Modules:** [`17_AI_CHATS_MODULE.md`](../backend/graphql.modules/17_AI_CHATS_MODULE.md), [`micro.services.apis/contact.ai.api.md`](../backend/micro.services.apis/contact.ai.api.md) (filename may vary).
